output.console: Audit result summary with pass/fail status and findings for the edited entry

success_handling.criteria: Knowledge audit flow completes and returns a structured audit result for the edited entry

error_handling.criteria: The knowledge-audit flow returns an error or does not complete
error_handling.action: Log audit failure as warning, do not block edit since the file is already written

event.message: Audit failed for edited entry {entry_id}, edit still succeeded

decisions.outcome: Log findings, proceed to regenerate-index step regardless
